summary: ReactiveUI ecosystem infrastructure for DI, service location, logging, and composition-root registration.
recommendedPatterns: Use Splat registration at the composition root.
Prefer generic registration and resolution APIs.
Prefer constructor injection in application code.
avoidPatterns: Do not spread global service-location calls through feature logic.
Do not assume shared mutable global resolver state is safe for libraries or tests.
setupSteps: Add Splat when DI or resolver integration is needed.
Keep library code independent from global resolver mutation where possible.
commonPitfalls: Leaking global resolver state between tests.
Using service locator instead of explicit dependencies in business logic.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
